title: Collapse/Expand Buttons (HasButtons)
text: Collapse/Expand Buttons (HasButtons) Determines whether Expand ( + ) or Collapse ( - ) buttons are displayed in the Tree View . True (default) or False " HasButtons = True | False " Value Description True Expand ( + ) or Collapse ( - ) buttons are displayed if the node has child nodes. If a node contains no child nodes, buttons expand and collapse buttons are not displayed. False + or - buttons are never displayed Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: None Using in ProcScript You can use $properties or $fieldproperties to set or get the property and its value. For more information, see $properties and $fieldproperties . $fieldproperties(FLD) = "HasButtons=false" Copy Applies To utree (Tree) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
